findings.message: standard.py and research.py in public v0.1 are functionally identical to V1 reference — same _stage helper signature, same 7-stage ordering, same gates (completion/test_pass/verification/review_approval), same bounce-back targets (warrior), same max_iterations=3, same parallel_group topology, same _multi_scout_workflow helper with scout_count=2/3/2 for dual/triple/spike.
Warrior produced 302 LOC minimal impl, no gold-plating. No speculative factories, no unused helpers, no extra defaults beyond V1 contract.

Grep across src/bonfire/workflows verified zero BON-NNN references, zero bonfire-beta references, zero forbidden imports (engine|dispatch|handlers|events|cli). Default registry registers exactly 5 factories (standard_build, debug, dual_scout, triple_scout, spike). project_strategist explicitly asserted absent via test_project_strategist_not_registered.
src/bonfire/workflow/ (singular) deleted. Diff shows '/dev/null' D-mode for __init__.py. Filesystem check confirms directory absent in worktree.

Knight-A (cd6a32f, 63 composition) + Knight-B (b9d0321, 79 fidelity) → Sage (9a97bbf, 119 canonical in 12 classes) → Warrior (dbdfdb0). Sage decisions doc articulates every divergence resolution (duplicate imports → merged, forbidden imports → Lens-B parametrized, TestFactoryInvariants → Lens-A kept, 3-prefix scope aligned with V1). Added test_project_strategist_not_registered as explicit negative lock.
Base branch v0.1 correct. Commit body includes 'Closes BON-336'. PR description articulates all 3 adaptations and TDD provenance table. Sage decisions doc linked.

TestFactoryInvariants.test_plan_is_frozen uses `with pytest.raises(Exception)` with B017 noqa. Acceptable for polyglot frozen-mutation test (Pydantic v2 raises ValidationError) but could tighten to pydantic.ValidationError in a follow-up. Non-blocking.

TestDependencyConstraints relies on sys.modules population from the autouse fixture. If test ordering somehow skips the fixture (it won't — autouse=True + function scope), the scan would be empty. Current design is safe; no change needed.
